title: viola columnaris
intro: Viola columnaris, also known as the columned pansy or columned violet, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Viola columnaris include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Viola columnaris can be made into teas, salves, or infusions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
